hooks.command: FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(tsx?|jsx?)$'; then cd C:/Users/LENOVO/.gemini/porano-perse && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | head -30; fi

FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(tsx?|jsx?)$'; then cd C:/Users/LENOVO/.gemini/porano-perse && npx eslint "$FILE" --no-warn-ignored 2>&1 | head -20; fi

FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then cd C:/Users/LENOVO/.gemini/porano-perse && python -m py_compile "$FILE" 2>&1 | head -10; fi
